intended_use_full: This computed tomography system is intended to generate and process cross-sectional images of patients by computer reconstruction of x-ray transmission data. The images delivered by the system can be used by a trained staff as an aid in diagnosis and treatment as well as for diagnostic and therapeutic interventions. This CT system can be used for low dose lung cancer screening in high risk populations.
target_condition: General diagnostic imaging; low dose lung cancer screening
